seo_title: MIT-IBM Computing Research Lab Launches to Shape the Future of AI…
meta_description: The MIT-IBM Computing Research Lab aims to unlock new computational approaches that go beyond classical systems, advancing AI and quantum computing research.
body_html:
The MIT-IBM Computing Research Lab launches to shape the future of AI and quantum computing with a goal of unlocking new computational approaches that go beyond classical systems.

Collaboration and ScopeBuilding on a long-standing collaboration between MIT and IBM, the lab expands its scope to include quantum computing alongside foundational artificial intelligence research.The lab aims to help lead research in AI and quantum computing and redefine mathematical foundations across both domains.Research Goals and ObjectivesObjectivesDescriptionUnlock new computational approaches that go beyond classical systemsThe lab aims to advance research in AI and quantum computing, pushing the boundaries of what is possible with these technologies.Redefine mathematical foundations across both domainsThe lab seeks to redefine the mathematical foundations of AI and quantum

computing, enabling new breakthroughs and innovations.Leadership and Partnerships“We expect the MIT-IBM Computing Research Lab to emerge as one of the world’s premier academic and industrial hubs accelerating the future of computing,” says Jay Gambetta, director of IBM Research and IBM Fellow.

source.title: The MIT-IBM Computing Research Lab launches to shape the future of AI and quantum computing
source.summary: Building on a long-standing MIT–IBM collaboration, the new lab will chart the convergence of AI, algorithms, and quantum computing.
